data.Name: SeismicBinGrid-IndexPropertyPathConfiguration-<timestamp>
data.Description: The index property list for bingrid<timestamp>:1., valid for all bingrid kinds for major version 1.

Configurations.Name: Extent
Configurations.UseCase: As a user I want to know the extent of a geodetic shape and use it to search data.

Configurations.Name: Area
Configurations.UseCase: As a user I want to find area of the regions with unit square meter.
